summary: Created replicate_chunks_to utility function in src/agent_recall/storage/utils.py. Added list_chunks method to Storage ABC and implementations for SQLite and RemoteStorage. Added comprehensive tests covering content preservation, embeddings, multiple chunks, and shared storage.
gotcha_discovered: Storage ABC did not have a list_chunks method to retrieve all chunks - had to add it as an abstract method.
pattern_that_worked: Used delegation pattern for RemoteStorage to delegate list_chunks to _HTTPClient, following existing patterns in the codebase.
